comment: Act 1 menu labyrinth — dish names verbatim from menu-lines.json (A7 ground truth), grouped into the unfolded menu's panels. 14 dishes total: the held line's count. Prices are deliberately generic and currency-free (DL59) — Act 1 sells the universal problem; the FCFA reality lives in Acts 3–4. Descriptions exist only on the dot's three hesitation targets (DL60): more information, never clarity.

items.name: Nems au poulet (×6)
items.description: Croustillants, sauce aigre-douce maison, coriandre fraîche. Par six.

items.name: Poulet Yassa
items.description: Oignons confits au citron, olives, riz brisé. Accompagnement au choix, selon arrivage.

items.name: Dibi mouton
items.description: Grillé au feu de bois, oignons, moutarde. Portion selon le marché du jour.
